limitations: This draft is automatically generated for human review and must be checked before public release.

Project stop/decision rationale: The real OMX trace classifier cleared the branch kill condition with 31.29% fewer missed stop/refusal interventions and no true-continue utility loss on held-out task families.
forbidden_global_claims: Do not claim peer review or public validation.
